description: PostToolUse(Task) recorder. Appends one JSONL line per Task tool call to the per-repo log <git-root>/.claude/logs/delegations.jsonl with fields: ts, subagent_type, description_hash (sha256 of normalized description, first 16 hex chars), cwd, session. harness-curate reads these logs to detect delegation patterns and propose skill candidates. Never raises: always exits 0. Canonical registration lives in the plugin's top-level hooks.json; this file documents the bundle.
